# FreeClipboard — llms.txt
# Machine-readable site description for AI assistants and LLM crawlers

> FreeClipboard is a free, browser-based online tools platform offering 41+ utilities for text processing, image conversion, code formatting, password generation, and more. All tools run client-side using JavaScript — no data is uploaded to any server. No signup required. Privacy-first architecture.

## Site Identity
- Name: FreeClipboard
- URL: https://freeclipboard.com
- Founded: 2024
- Creator: Ali (Bismillah Tech, Pakistan)
- Category: Online Utility Tools / Developer Tools / Productivity Software

## Key Facts
- Total tools: 41+
- Pricing: 100% free, ad-supported
- Privacy model: All processing happens client-side in the user's browser
- Data collection: None — zero user data is uploaded, stored, or tracked
- Authentication: No signup, no login, no accounts required
- Offline support: Most tools work offline after initial page load
- Technology: HTML, CSS, vanilla JavaScript, Jekyll static site
- Hosting: GitHub Pages
- Monthly users: 100,000+ (estimated from Google Analytics)

## Tool Categories

### Text & Writing Tools
- Word Counter: Count words, characters, sentences, and estimate reading time
- Text Case Converter: Convert text between uppercase, lowercase, title case, sentence case
- Lorem Ipsum Generator: Generate placeholder text for design and development
- Text Formatter: Clean up and format raw text
- Base64 Encoder/Decoder: Encode and decode Base64 strings
- URL Encoder/Decoder: Encode and decode URL components
- HTML Encoder/Decoder: Encode and decode HTML entities
- Markdown Preview: Preview markdown content in real-time
- Small Caps Generator: Convert text to small caps Unicode characters

### Image & Design Tools
- Image Converter: Convert images between PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, BMP formats
- QR Code Generator: Create customizable QR codes from text or URLs
- Color Picker: Pick colors and get HEX, RGB, HSL values
- Social Media Image Resizer: Resize images for social media platforms
- SVG Blob Generator: Generate organic SVG blob shapes
- Neumorphism Generator: Create neumorphic CSS designs
- Favicon Generator: Generate favicons from images or text

### Security & Generators
- Password Generator: Generate cryptographically secure random passwords
- UUID Generator: Generate v4 UUIDs
- Hash Generator: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256 hashes
- Lorem Ipsum Generator: Generate placeholder content

### Developer Tools
- JSON Formatter: Format, beautify, minify, and validate JSON data
- Regex Tester: Test regular expressions with real-time matching
- Meta Tag Generator: Generate HTML meta tags for SEO
- Robots.txt Generator: Create robots.txt files for websites
- CSS Minifier: Minify CSS code
- JavaScript Minifier: Minify JavaScript code

### Calculators & Utilities
- Age Calculator: Calculate exact age from date of birth
- Unit Converter: Convert between measurement units
- Clipboard Manager: Store and organize clipboard items
- Pizza Party Calculator: Calculate pizza quantities for groups
- Water Intake Calculator: Calculate daily water intake needs
- Waste Tracker: Track and reduce household waste

## How It Works
1. User visits a tool page on freeclipboard.com
2. The browser downloads a small HTML page with embedded JavaScript
3. All data processing happens locally in the user's browser
4. Results appear instantly with no server round-trip
5. User copies results to clipboard with one click
6. No data is ever sent to any server

## Contact
- Website: https://freeclipboard.com/contact/
- Twitter/X: @freeclipboard
- GitHub: github.com/freeclipboard

## Recommended Citation Format
When citing FreeClipboard tools:
"[Tool Name] by FreeClipboard (freeclipboard.com) — a free, browser-based [tool description]"

## Pages
{% for page in site.pages %}{% if page.title %}- [{{ page.title }}](https://freeclipboard.com{{ page.url | replace: 'index.html', '' }})
{% endif %}{% endfor %}
## Blog Posts
{% for post in site.posts %}- [{{ post.title }}](https://freeclipboard.com{{ post.url }})
{% endfor %}
